description_long: This is a rectangular filing cabinet integrated into a desk, featuring a wood-textured top surface and a black metal frame. On one side, there are two drawers, the upper one smaller and the lower one larger, both with colored fronts—orange for the top and blue for the bottom. The drawers are set into a wooden enclosure that matches the tabletop, while the rest of the structure is open beneath the desk. The handles on the drawers are simple horizontal bars, and there are no visible label holders or lock mechanisms. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, suitable for urban office or workspace environments. The cabinet is compact, with a sturdy appearance and a flat surface suitable for supporting various objects.
description: A modern desk with an integrated two-drawer filing cabinet, featuring a wood top, colored drawer fronts, and a black metal frame. The design is compact and functional, ideal for office or workspace use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wood tabletop, black frame, and two colored drawers (orange and blue) on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the desk and the wood grain of the tabletop.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden enclosure of the filing cabinet and the open frame on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid wood panel of the cabinet and the underside of the desk.
